emails.subject: PLI Securities Laws Seminar
emails.body: PLI Securities Laws Seminar Mark: The PLI has a 2-day seminar in Houston on Nov. 5 and 6 which I would like to attend (mega-refresher course for me). The cost is $1295. Although I have been looking for a seminar about equity derivatives, this seminar will be helpful in the context of ENE forwards and other affiliated equity deals from the securities vantage point. Sara Let me know if you would like to see the brochure. Sara Sara Shackleton Enron Wholesale Services 1400 Smith Street, EB3801a Houston, TX 77002 Ph: (713) 853-5620 Fax: (713) 646-3490

emails.subject: RE: PLI Securities Laws Seminar
emails.body: RE: PLI Securities Laws Seminar Sounds good to me. To: Taylor, Mark E (Legal)
